# kSecTransformErrorInvalidInputDictionary

**Global Variable**

A dictionary used to import a transform has invalid data.

## Declaration

```swift
var kSecTransformErrorInvalidInputDictionary: CFIndex { get }
```

## Discussion

This error may occur when trying to import a transform from a data representation using the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformCreateFromExternalRepresentation(_:_:)] function.
title: kSecTransformErrorInvalidInputDictionary
